name: Grilled Bananas w/ Vanilla Ice Cream & Hot Chocolate Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 stick unsalted butter, melted and cooled
good quality store bought vanilla ice cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill pan.
2. Peel bananas and halve lengthwise. In a shallow baking pan large enough to hold bananas in one layer, stir together melted butter and brown sugar. Add bananas, tossing gently to coat.
3. Transfer bananas with a metal spatula to an oiled grill pan. Grill until browned and cooked through, about 2 minutes on each side. If the bananas are difficult to handle, they can be grilled on just one side.
4. In a heavy saucepan, combine chopped chocolate, cinnamon, and half-and-half over low heat, stirring frequently until the chocolate is melted.
5. Serve bananas like a banana split with ice cream and hot chocolate sauce.
Yield: 2 servings
